old_scholar.test_fields.speaker: Old Scholar
old_scholar.test_fields.text: Greetings, apprentice. I am researching the history of these ancient fields.

old_scholar.test_fields.speaker: Old Scholar
old_scholar.test_fields.text: They say that to the East, beyond the threshold, lies a colder land.

old_scholar.quest_active_reminder.speaker: Old Scholar
old_scholar.quest_active_reminder.text: Please find my lost notebook in the fields. It has critical historical research inside.

old_scholar.quest_active_ready.speaker: Old Scholar
old_scholar.quest_active_ready.text: Oh, you found my lost notebook! This is marvelous!

old_scholar.quest_active_ready.speaker: Old Scholar
old_scholar.quest_active_ready.text: Thank you, apprentice. Here is a small stipend and some travel rations for your diligence.

old_scholar.quest_completed.speaker: Old Scholar
old_scholar.quest_completed.text: Thank you again for returning my notebook. My research can now continue.
